item.title: 微软 vs. AWS：《星际迷航》中的理想 AI 与直率的功利主义 AI 相遇
item.summary: The AI Deployment Wars are expanding beyond technology into branding. Microsoft's ambitious Frontier Company contrasts sharply with AWS's practical Forward Deployed Engineering, raising questions about which message resonates with enterprise executives. The post Microsoft vs. AWS: Star Trek Aspirational AI Meets Blunt
